requirements.summary: Update all domain references to securelytime.com across frontend configuration, HTML meta tags, and source code
acceptanceCriteria: All domain references in the codebase point to securelytime.com
The index.html or any HTML meta/canonical tags reference securelytime.com if applicable
No references to any previous domain remain in configuration or source files

file_operations.description: Update any domain references in HTML meta tags, canonical URLs, or Open Graph tags to use securelytime.com
Update Google Search Console verification file to reference securelytime.com if it contains any domain-specific content or meta tags
Search for and replace any hardcoded domain strings with securelytime.com
Update any domain references in error messages, fallback text, or CSP-related comments to use securelytime.com
Update any hardcoded domain strings or configuration references to securelytime.com
Update any domain references in application initialization or metadata to securelytime.com
